company.name: US Digital Marketing (UDM)
company.address: MVPC+8WC, Indrapuri Colony, DAVV Takshila Indore, MP 452001
company.tagline: We don't run ads. We build growth systems.
company.description: US Digital Marketing is a performance marketing agency based in Indore. Since 2021, we have been engineering digital dominance for local businesses. We don't just run ads — we build complete growth architectures that turn clicks into real customers and deliver measurable ROI.

services.name: Performance Marketing
services.description: Hyper-targeted Google and Meta ad campaigns designed to bring in high-intent buyers only. We eliminate wasted spend and maximize conversions.

services.name: Social Media Growth
services.description: Cinematic Instagram Reels, viral content hooks, and consistent brand storytelling that builds audience and drives inbound leads.

services.name: Lead Generation
services.description: End-to-end funnel building that captures, qualifies, and delivers ready-to-buy leads directly to your sales team.

services.name: Local Market Domination
services.description: Become the go-to brand in your city. We use geo-targeted ads, local SEO, and reputation systems to make your business the first choice.

services.name: Brand Identity & Content
services.description: From logo to full brand kit, we create a visual identity that makes your business look premium and trustworthy.

services.name: Website & Funnel Design
services.description: High-converting websites and sales funnels built specifically to turn visitors into paying customers.

process.title: Discovery Call
process.description: We understand your business, target customers, and goals.

process.title: Strategy Build
process.description: Within 12 hours of onboarding, we build your custom growth strategy.

process.title: Campaign Launch
process.description: Ads and content go live. Results start showing in 7-14 days.

process.title: Optimize & Scale
process.description: We analyze data weekly and scale what works, cut what doesn't.

faqs.q: How soon will I see results?
faqs.a: Most clients see measurable results within 7 to 14 days of campaign launch. Full momentum typically builds over 30-60 days.

faqs.q: Do I need to provide an ad budget separately?
faqs.a: Yes. Our service fee covers strategy, management, and execution. Your ad spend (Google/Meta budget) is separate and directly managed by you.

faqs.q: Which plan is best for me?
faqs.a: It depends on your business size and goals. For new businesses, STARTER or SMART works well. For scaling, ADVANCED or PRO is recommended. ELITE is for full city domination.

faqs.q: Do you work with businesses outside Indore?
faqs.a: Yes, we work with businesses across India and internationally. Our digital strategies work for any location.

faqs.q: What makes UDM different from other agencies?
faqs.a: We don't just run ads — we build complete growth systems. We give regional exclusivity to elite clients, meaning we won't work with your direct competitor in the same area.
You can pay via UPI (utkarshsinghhh340@oksbi), bank transfer to Kotak Mahindra Bank (A/C: 6049669529, IFSC: KKBK0005336), PayPal (@UtkarshSingh521), or Payoneer (utkarshsinghhh340@gmail.com).
We work on a monthly basis. No long-term contracts required, though clients who stay 3+ months see the best results.

terms.ad_budget: Service fee is independent of ad budget
